description: Main-window capability set: pty (custom commands), sql, stronghold, dialog, os. Sidecar binaries spawn through tokio::process directly (see src-tauri/src/sidecar/), not through tauri-plugin-shell. fs:* perm identifiers are listed with empty allow arrays — no static main-window fs grants; per-pkg fs is granted dynamically by pkg/registries/permissions.rs::add_fs_capabilities, and Rust-side app fs (commands::fs::*) bypasses Tauri ACL and enforces fs_roots.rs instead.
